ValidationRule.description: Last - MIS-2939 - added email opt-out MIS-2095 - if the phone opt-out is checked you can't enter a phone number unless you are a sales ops or integration
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( AND( Phone_Opt_out__c = False, ischanged(Phone_Opt_out__c) ), AND( HasOptedOutOfEmail = False, ISCHANGED(HasOptedOutOfEmail) ) ), $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", $Profile.Name <> "Integration User", $Profile.Name <> "Integration User No DF", $User.Id<>Owner.ManagerId )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The user requested not to be contacted by phone or email, if you want to change the status, please contact Salesops and provide legal confirmation for this change
